name: iblai-openclaw-router
description: Smart model router that routes OpenClaw requests to LIGHT/MEDIUM/HEAVY model tiers via a 14-dimension weighted scorer. Zero-dependency Node.js local proxy with hot-reload config, systemd integration, and ~80% cost savings on cron/subagent workloads.
review: Smart model routing filling a genuine gap in the OpenClaw skills catalog. Zero-dependency local proxy routes requests to LIGHT/MEDIUM/HEAVY tiers via 14-dimension weighted scorer with sigmoid confidence mapping. ~80% cost savings on subagents and cron jobs. No similar local model router exists in the catalog.
